title: 毎日王冠の後に・そして“光”へ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Silence Suzuka dominates the track! Just
wow! Silence Suzuka comes out on top of this
race between generational talents!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
What a race! Silence Suzuka blew right through
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She's even faster than she was in the Takarazuka
Kinen, right?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and El Condor Pasa were great
too, But Suzuka was just something else!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! Rayos! I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I ran at full speed! Am I slow or something?! Why
couldn't I catch up?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh, I'll get you next time, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So you better not lose your edge! I have to be the
one who beats the Otherworldly Front-Runner!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka... We'll face each other on the track again
someday!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Arrrgh! I can't get the word "slow" out of my head!
Maldición!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Don't be like that, El...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the excitement of today's intense
competition will take a while to settle.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I surprised myself out there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The way I ran, it was like I wasn't myself. I felt as
though I could fly off.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Is it really okay for me to continue running like
this?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I guess you're right. It's fine, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm sorry. I must sound strange.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, that reminds me! Where's Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Sorry I left without saying anything...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. More importantly... Are you doing all
right? I heard you were feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Urk... Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know, watching both El and Grass giving
their all to beat you...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It made me super jealous.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be down there so bad, I was tingling
all over.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've never felt this way watching you race before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's been infected by El Condor Pasa's
and Grass Wonder's desire to beat Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's no longer satisfied with only catching up to
Silence Suzuka. The fire to surpass her has been
lit.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm like a guiding light to you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A... guiding light?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week's face slowly brightens.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That sounds about right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Yeah, that's totally what it is! What a
relief!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, I was worried these feelings were bad.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, Spe. I'm happy you feel that way about
me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's smile proves to be infectious, as
Special Week breaks into one of her own.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best to keep you in second
place, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! I dunno if I'm ready to challenge
you yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mainichi Okan has truly sparked the passion
of many Umamusume today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Silence Suzuka reigning victorious, she turns
toward her next objective...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The long-awaited autumn Tenno Sho.
